calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Jew for petitioner Matthew Boehler (via Zoom).
Michelle Mitchell, beneficiary (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court noted that one of the subscribing witnesses, Ms. Mitchell, was also a beneficiary of a bequest of certain whiskey collections, raising an issue under Probate Code section 6112.

Ms. Mitchell stated she did not object to the petition and explained her relationship with the decedent and the shared interest that led to the specific bequest.

The Court stated it did not see evidence of undue influence but, consistent with section 6112, would reserve any determination as to the validity of the bequest during administration. The Court indicated it would admit the will while carving out paragraph 5(a), with the issue to be addressed later through appropriate petition.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 24, 2024, is admitted to probate. Matthew Boehler is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 14, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS
